title: Transaction Logs for Digital Product Sales Explained for Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're a digital creator in a country with PayPal restrictions, and you can't sell your ebooks, courses, or templates because of banking limitations. You've tried Gumroad, Payhip, and other platforms that require KYC, but they just won't work. You need a reliable way to collect payments and deliver digital products without relying on conventional payment processors. That's where Unchained Commerce comes in, with our Admin Dashboard ($29.99) that gives you unparalleled control over your digital sales, from anywhere in the world.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Transaction logs for digital product sales are a record of every order, payment, and delivery made through your digital store. It's a critical component of any e-commerce operation, allowing you to track the success of your sales, identify areas for improvement, and troubleshoot any issues that may arise. Without transaction logs, you'd be flying blind, unable to see what's working and what's not. That's why Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard ($29.99) includes advanced transaction logging capabilities, giving you a clear picture of your digital sales at all times.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

When you enable transaction logging in your Admin Dashboard, every order and payment is automatically recorded and stored in a secure database. This data is then made available to you through a user-friendly interface, allowing you to view and manage your sales in real-time. Our system also includes robust filtering and sorting capabilities, making it easy to find specific orders or transactions quickly. Whether you're looking to analyze sales trends or troubleshoot a particular issue, Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard has got you covered.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard is designed specifically for digital creators who need a reliable way to collect payments and deliver digital products without relying on conventional payment processors. Whether you're an author selling ebooks, a course creator, or a designer selling templates, our system is tailored to meet your unique needs. With our Admin Dashboard ($29.99), you can sell your digital products with confidence, knowing that every order and payment is securely recorded and easily manageable.
Automated delivery means the download link arrives before the buyer navigates away from the payment confirmation page.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Our Admin Dashboard ($29.99) is built on top of a robust infrastructure that includes NOWPayments, a leading cryptocurrency payment processor that supports over 300 different coins. This allows you to accept payments from customers in any country, without worrying about KYC restrictions or other obstacles. Our system also includes advanced delivery automation, ensuring that your digital products are delivered to customers instantly, without any manual intervention. With Unchained Commerce, you can focus on creating and selling your digital products, while we handle the technical details.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know the importance of transaction logs for digital product sales, it's time to take action. First, sign up for an Unchained Commerce account and activate your Admin Dashboard ($29.99). Next, configure your payment settings to use NOWPayments, and set up your delivery automation to ensure that your digital products are delivered quickly and efficiently. Finally, start selling your digital products with confidence, knowing that every order and payment is securely recorded and easily manageable.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Every digital file type — ebooks, fonts, presets, plugins, templates — works with the same delivery pipeline.
